logos.description: Text-based logo: 'Shtëpi' in gold (#D4A843) + 'AL' in cream (#FDF8F0), font-display (Playfair Display), font-bold, tracking-tight

tone.target_audience: Albanian property seekers (buyers, renters), real estate agencies, property investors, and developers in Albania
sample_copy: Gjej shtëpinë tënde — Find your home
Të gjitha njoftimet e pasurive të paluajtshme në Shqipëri, në një vend. — All real estate listings in Albania, in one place.
Agregator i njoftimeve të pasurive të paluajtshme në Shqipëri. Gjeni apartamente, shtëpi, vila dhe tokë nga burime të ndryshme, në një vend.
Rritni agjensinë tuaj me mjete profesionale per menaxhimin e njoftimeve, leads dhe analitikes. — Grow your agency with professional tools.
Gjeni pronën e ëndrrave tuaja me avantazh. Qasje e hershme, njoftime çmimi, dhe analiza tregu. — Find your dream property with an advantage.
Llogaritni vleren e tregut bazuar ne te dhenat kadastrale te Shqiperise — Calculate market value based on Albanian cadastral data.

value_propositions: Aggregates listings from 13 Albanian real estate portals into one search
Fair price scoring compares listing prices to market averages per city
Agency subscription plans with lead management, CRM export, and ranking boosts
Buyer Plus gives early access (2h), price drop alerts, and ad-free experience for €4.99/mo
Market data dashboards and API for investors and developers
Property valuation tool using official cadastral zone data (3057 zones from DevInfProna)
key_messages: All Albanian real estate in one place
Grow your agency with professional tools
Transparent market data for smarter decisions
Early access and fair price insights for buyers

pages.title: Kryefaqja (Home)
pages.purpose: Hero with search bar, quick city links, recent listings grid, stats counter

pages.title: Njoftimet (Listings)
pages.purpose: Full listing search with filters, map/list toggle, sorting, pagination

pages.title: City Listings
pages.purpose: City-specific listings with SEO metadata

pages.title: Listing Detail
pages.purpose: Full listing detail with gallery, map, contact form, price history, mortgage calculator

pages.title: City Landing
pages.purpose: SEO landing pages for each of 22 Albanian cities

pages.title: City + Type Landing
pages.purpose: SEO pages for city + sale/rent combinations

pages.title: Agjensitë (Agencies)
pages.purpose: Agency directory with listing counts

pages.title: Agency Profile
pages.purpose: Individual agency page with their listings

pages.title: Çmimet (Pricing)
pages.purpose: Agency subscription plans: Starter €49, Growth €149, Premium €399, Enterprise custom

pages.title: Buyer Plus
pages.purpose: Consumer subscription landing page: €4.99/mo for early access, price alerts, ad-free

pages.title: Projektet (Projects)
pages.purpose: New development projects directory with featured carousel

pages.title: Project Detail
pages.purpose: Individual developer project with contact form and comparison tool

pages.title: Vlerësimi (Valuation)
pages.purpose: Property valuation calculator using official cadastral zone data

pages.title: Të dhëna tregu (Market Data)
pages.purpose: Market data product landing page: dashboard €199/mo, API €499/mo

pages.title: Dashboard i tregut
pages.purpose: Market analytics dashboard with city metrics, trends, yield data

pages.title: Paneli (Dashboard)
pages.purpose: User dashboard: own listings, favorites, campaigns, leads, subscription

pages.title: Të preferuarat
pages.purpose: User's saved/favorited listings

pages.title: Leads
pages.purpose: Agency lead management with scoring and CRM export

pages.title: Fushatat (Campaigns)
pages.purpose: Agency ad campaign management

pages.title: Abonimin (Subscription)
pages.purpose: Subscription management with Stripe portal

pages.title: Admin
pages.purpose: Admin panel: moderate listings, manage plans, view revenue

pages.title: Hyrje (Sign In)
pages.purpose: Login page with Google OAuth via Supabase

pages.title: Regjistrohu (Register)
pages.purpose: Registration page

features.name: Multi-source Aggregation
features.description: Crawls 13 Albanian real estate portals daily via Scrapy spiders, deduplicates, normalizes, and stores in PostgreSQL

features.name: Interactive Map Search
features.description: Leaflet-based map with clustering, bbox filtering, geolocation ('Pranë meje'), and popup listing cards

features.name: Advanced Filtering
features.description: Filter by city, transaction type, property type, price range, area range, rooms, and source

features.name: Agency Subscriptions
features.description: 4-tier agency plans (Starter/Growth/Premium/Enterprise) with listing limits, lead credits, CRM export, ranking boost

features.name: Sponsored Listings
features.description: Ad system with CPM/CPC/CPL bidding, frequency caps, impression batching, and sponsored badges

features.name: Buyer Plus
features.description: Consumer subscription for early access, unlimited price alerts, unlimited saved searches, ad-free experience

features.name: Fair Price Score
features.description: Compares listing price per m² against market average for the city and property type

features.name: Property Valuation
features.description: Calculator using 3057 official cadastral zones from DevInfProna with reference values

features.name: Market Data
features.description: Dashboard and API products with avg €/m², median price, rent yield, inventory depth per city

features.name: Lead Management
features.description: Lead scoring, status tracking, notes, CRM export for agencies

features.name: Price History
features.description: Tracks price changes over time with visual chart on listing detail pages

features.name: Mortgage Calculator
features.description: Inline calculator on listing pages with configurable rate, term, and down payment

features.name: Developer Projects
features.description: Directory of new construction projects with featured carousel, filters, and contact forms

features.name: SEO City Pages
features.description: Pre-rendered landing pages for all 22 Albanian cities with structured data (JSON-LD)

video: remotion (social/ directory for social media video generation)
